evidence_summary: [CH001_SC003] Purpose: Establish the goal (the garden) and the immediate obstacle (the locked doors).

[CH001_SC003] Summary: Alice lands on a heap of sticks and leaves. She follows the Rabbit into a long, lamp-lit hall filled with many locked doors. She discovers a tiny golden key on a glass table and finds a small door hidden behind a curtain. The key work...
[CH001_SC003] Coverage: Low-angle shots of the hall; Close-ups of the golden key and the lock; Macro shots of the garden through the small opening.
[CH001_SC003] Continuity: The scale of Alice relative to the door; The lighting transition from the dark hall to the bright garden view.

[CH001] Chapter summary: **Setting:** - A riverbank (sunny, hot day). - A large rabbit-hole under a hedge. - A deep vertical well/tunnel lined with cupboards, bookshelves, maps, and pictures. - A long, low hall lit by a row of hanging lamps,...
